summary: Added uHasSizeAttr uniform (default 0.0) to COMMON_UNIFORMS and all four vertex shaders. Replaced raw `size` usage in point-size calculation with `mix(1.0, size, uHasSizeAttr)` so shaders fall back to a uniform base size (multiplier=1.0) when the per-vertex size attribute is absent. Moved `size` from required to optional attribute arrays in shaderRegistry. Updated geometryValidator to accept optional attributes (validated when present, skipped when absent). All geometry systems set uHasSizeAttr=1.0 since they attach the size attribute. Updated existing shaderIntegrity tests for the new attribute classification. Created fallbackPointSize.test.ts with 41 tests covering all acceptance criteria. Build passes, all 912 tests pass.
